donate.title: Make a wedding gift
donate.message_1: We are so grateful that you’ve chosen to give us a wedding gift.
donate.message_2: Your generosity truly means the world to us and will help us start this new chapter together.
donate.message_3: If you’d like to continue, you can securely make your gift via PayPal below.
